ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code for the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Overall poverty rate of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the county data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snap_data" (
  "snap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SNAP data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "redemp_snaps08" REAL /* Redeemed SNAP benefits in 2008 */,
  "redemp_snaps12" REAL /* Redeemed SNAP benefits in 2012 */,
  "pch_redemp_snaps_08_12" REAL /* Percent change in redeemed SNAP benefits from 2008 to 2012 */,
  "redemp_snaps16" REAL /* Redeemed SNAP benefits in 2016 */,
  "redemp_snaps20" REAL /* Redeemed SNAP benefits in 2020 */,
  "pch_redemp_snaps_12_16" REAL /* Percent change in redeemed SNAP benefits from 2012 to 2016 */,
  "pch_redemp_snaps_16_20" REAL /* Percent change in redeemed SNAP benefits from 2016 to 2020 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the SNAP data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snap_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_data" (
  "poverty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "pct_snap09" REAL /* Percent of population receiving SNAP benefits in 2009 */,
  "pct_snap14" REAL /* Percent of population receiving SNAP benefits in 2014 */,
  "pch_snap_09_14" REAL /* Percent change in SNAP participation from 2009 to 2014 */,
  "pct_snap19" REAL /* Percent of population receiving SNAP benefits in 2019 */,
  "pct_snap20" REAL /* Percent of population receiving SNAP benefits in 2020 */,
  "pch_snap_14_19" REAL /* Percent change in SNAP participation from 2014 to 2019 */,
  "pch_snap_19_20" REAL /* Percent change in SNAP participation from 2019 to 2020 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the poverty data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition_programs" (
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrition program data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "pc_snapben08" REAL /* Percent of population receiving SNAP benefits in 2008 */,
  "pc_snapben10" REAL /* Percent of population receiving SNAP benefits in 2010 */,
  "pch_pc_snapben_08_10" REAL /* Percent change in SNAP participation from 2008 to 2010 */,
  "pc_snapben12" REAL /* Percent of population receiving SNAP benefits in 2012 */,
  "pc_snapben14" REAL /* Percent of population receiving SNAP benefits in 2014 */,
  "pch_pc_snapben_12_14" REAL /* Percent change in SNAP participation from 2012 to 2014 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the nutrition program data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_programs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snap_participation" (
  "snap_participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SNAP participation record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "snap_part_rate08" REAL /* SNAP participation rate in 2008 */,
  "snap_part_rate10" REAL /* SNAP participation rate in 2010 */,
  "snap_oapp00" REAL /* SNAP OAPP (Outreach and Application Process) in 2000 */,
  "snap_oapp05" REAL /* SNAP OAPP in 2005 */,
  "snap_oapp10" REAL /* SNAP OAPP in 2010 */,
  "snap_part_rate12" REAL /* SNAP participation rate in 2012 */,
  "snap_part_rate14" REAL /* SNAP participation rate in 2014 */,
  "snap_part_rate16" REAL /* SNAP participation rate in 2016 */,
  "snap_part_rate20" REAL /* SNAP participation rate in 2020 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the SNAP participation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snap_participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snap_participation_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "face_waiver" (
  "face_waiver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each face-to-face interview waiver record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "snap_facewaiver00" REAL /* SNAP face-to-face interview waiver in 2000 */,
  "snap_facewaiver05" REAL /* SNAP face-to-face interview waiver in 2005 */,
  "snap_facewaiver10" REAL /* SNAP face-to-face interview waiver in 2010 */,
  "snap_facewaiver15" REAL /* SNAP face-to-face interview waiver in 2015 */,
  "snap_facewaiver20" REAL /* SNAP face-to-face interview waiver in 2020 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the face waiver data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("face_waiver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_face_waiver_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_exclusion" (
  "vehicle_exclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle exclusion record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "snap_vehexcl00" REAL /* SNAP vehicle exclusion in 2000 */,
  "snap_vehexcl05" REAL /* SNAP vehicle exclusion in 2005 */,
  "snap_vehexcl10" REAL /* SNAP vehicle exclusion in 2010 */,
  "snap_vehexcl15" REAL /* SNAP vehicle exclusion in 2015 */,
  "snap_vehexcl20" REAL /* SNAP vehicle exclusion in 2020 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the vehicle exclusion data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_exclusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_exclusion_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bbce" (
  "bbce_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BBCE record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "snap_bbce00" REAL /* SNAP BBCE in 2000 */,
  "snap_bbce05" REAL /* SNAP BBCE in 2005 */,
  "snap_bbce10" REAL /* SNAP BBCE in 2010 */,
  "snap_bbce15" REAL /* SNAP BBCE in 2015 */,
  "snap_bbce20" REAL /* SNAP BBCE in 2020 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the BBCE data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bbce_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bbce_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
